brief_justification: Paper A's machinery is representation theory of a deformed (kappa) Poincare/Galilei symmetry algebra with a first-quantized two-particle model on a noncommutative spacetime; Paper B's machinery is the construction of an exact regular axisymmetric solution of classical Einstein gravity that deforms the Kerr metric. There is no role-for-role correspondence between deformed-algebra representation theory and classical exact-metric construction; the only overlap is the distant 'quantum gravity / relativity' motivation, which is shared vocabulary, not shared transferable machinery.
